PluginData.Author: biterplease
PluginData.Tooltip: Low-footprint profiler for Space Engineers mods
PluginData.Description:
Observes a target mod at SE framework boundaries using Harmony patches and CLR ETW events. Outputs a JSONL event stream by default, with optional Prometheus-format aggregate export. Mods may optionally reference SEProfiler.Lib for internal instrumentation.
Drop a cmd.json in %AppData%\SpaceEngineers\SEModProfiler\ to scope a mod at runtime without restarting the game.
